title: macrosamanea discolor
intro: Macrosamanea discolor, also known as the Yellow Ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Macrosamanea discolor include treating fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for herbal use, although its preparations may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
